name: SENKO Group Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: SENKO Group Holdings Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a logistics company worldwide. The company operates through three segments: Distribution, Trading & Commerce, and Others. The Distribution segment is involved in truck transportation, marine transportation, logistic service, retail logistics, and railway forwarding activities. The Trading & Commerce segment engages in the sale of petroleum products; and trading business. The Others segment primarily provides data processing outsourcing, automobile maintenance, and insurance agency services. The company was formerly known as Senko Co., Ltd. and changed its name to SENKO Group Holdings Co., Ltd. in April 2017. SENKO Group Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1916 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
